query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelTotal, awayModelSpread, modelAwayML FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL' AND id >= 2070011 ORDER BY id ASC;
UPDATE games SET publishedToFeed = 1, publishedModel = 1 WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL' AND modelRunAt IS NOT NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, modelAwayScore, modelHomeScore, modelTotal, awayModelSpread, modelAwayML FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL' AND id >= 2070011 ORDER BY id ASC;
UPDATE games SET publishedToFeed = 1, publishedModel = 1 WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-28' AND sport = 'NHL' AND modelRunAt IS NOT NULL;
